TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 21 ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Central african republic ta sayang o kiya ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 30 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra (kngkawas 1957 idas 4 diyax 21-), Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo na Seyjicya, kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 22 prading ngalan Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo Congri, kngkawas 2013 idas 1 mnhdu qpahun. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra (1957ŚĻī4śúą21śó•Ôľć),Central African Republic Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mptusa Pyasan Tubeyhing Suswey, kngkawas 2004 prading daw ngalan Pyasan Tubeyhing Bangui Kocyo, kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 22 cida pnlawa na Fulangsuowa Boziz√© pnsdhuwan phiyu burah Congri, lmutuc wada malax qpahun na Elie Dotai. Kngkawas 2013 idas 1 diyax 17, heytay hantay seyhu u wada umluk ya bay 1/3 dxral qnlhangan, seyhu mi Hantaypay u wada Mddahur Pbatas Psblayaq Pnsdhuwan, wada palaxan qpahun ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, Hantaypay ryus Nicolas Tianguei ka wada phyuwan Congri. Kngkawas 2016 idas 2 diyax 14, Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mniq kngkawas 2015 dhuq kngkawas 2016 Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo knbeyhing seyngkyo kcka tumn2 seyngkyo wada mangal 62.71% hyo mbiyax mangal, idas 3 diyax 30 cida psdhuwan phiyu Soto. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 12 muda Soto seyngkyo tu1 meytaq hyo cida mangal 53.92% niqan brihan hyo wada mbiyax, mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2018 niqan ka kari qnbhangan tmiyu Russia na Wagner Citwan u snquri Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra nanaq muda qpahun quri pawan. Kndusan niya cuxan mi kyoiku Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mntuting Bangui; cbiyaw balay pnyahan llutuc tnsapah niya Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u snpeyyah tudaya Bangui na Damara. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Barthelemy Boganda muyas, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 1976 cida mangal Sweys Sweywey, bukuy daw mniq kngkawas 1986 cida mniq France Pyasan Tubeyhing Lille Keci (Lille I) mangal Hakasey Sweywey. Kndusan niya Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa msturung Brigitte Touad√©ra miMarguerite "Tina" Touad√©ra. Spuda pmklan kari singbung hokoku, ddha qridin niyi u mniq buykuy pa muda balay ppweluk hangan Tu1 Hujn Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo. Faustin-Archange Touad√©raŤąáBrigitte Touad√©raŚŹäMarguerite "Tina" Touad√©ra Kiya uri pa, Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u niqan 3 ka laqi niya.
S.PHON: = *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶…ônt…ĺal a*…ĺi ¶an …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ ta sajaŇč o kija ka *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **-), tuk ¶ka a*…ĺika koŇčńßkwo na s…ô…üi ¶ja, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan tuk ¶ka a*…ĺika koŇčńßkwo ¶oŇč…ĺi, kŇčkawas **** idas * mnńßdu qpańßun. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa (***********), ¶…ônt…ĺal a*…ĺi ¶an …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa pa mptusa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč susw…ô, kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč daw Ňčalan pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč baŇčui ko ¶jo, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida pnlawa na *ulaŇčsuowa bo*i** pnsdńßuwan pńßiju bu…ĺańß ¶oŇč…ĺi, lmutu ¶ wada malax qpańßun na …ôli…ô dotai. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńß…ôtaj ńßantaj s…ôńßu u wada umluk ja baj */* dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan, s…ôńßu mi ńßantajpaj u wada mddańßu…ĺ pbatas psblajaq pnsdńßuwan, wada palaxan qpańßun ka *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa, ńßantajpaj …ĺjus ni ¶olas tiaŇču…ôi ka wada pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa pa mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** tuk ¶ka a*…ĺika koŇčńßkwo knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo k ¶ka tumn* s…ôŇčkjo wada maŇčal **.**% ńßjo mbijax maŇčal, idas * dijax ** ¶ida psdńßuwan pńßiju soto. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** muda soto s…ôŇčkjo tu* m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida maŇčal **.**% niqan b…ĺińßan ńßjo wada mbijax, mnduŇčus lmutu ¶ maŇčal soto. kŇčkawas **** niqan ka ka…ĺi qnbńßaŇčan tmiju …ĺussia na wagn…ô…ĺ ¶itwan u snqu…ĺi *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa nanaq muda qpańßun qu…ĺi pawan. kndusan nija ¶uxan mi kjoiku *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa pa mntutiŇč baŇčui; ¶bijaw balaj pnjańßan llutu ¶ tnsapańß nija *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u snp…ôjańß tudaja baŇčui na dama…ĺa. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn ba…ĺtńß…ôl…ômj boganda mujas, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida maŇčal sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô, bukuj daw mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mniq *…ĺan ¶…ô pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč lill…ô k…ô ¶i (lill…ô i) maŇčal ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kndusan nija *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa pa mstu…ĺuŇč b…ĺigitt…ô touad*…ĺa mima…ĺgu…ô…ĺit…ô "tina" touad*…ĺa. spuda pmklan ka…ĺi siŇčbuŇč ńßokoku, ddńßa q…ĺidin niji u mniq bujkuj pa muda balaj ppw…ôluk ńßaŇčan tu* ńßu…ün tuk ¶ka a*…ĺika koŇčńßkwo. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa*b…ĺigitt…ô touad*…ĺa*ma…ĺgu…ô…ĺit…ô "tina" touad*…ĺa kija u…ĺi pa, *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u niqan * ka laqi nija.
S.FORM: = Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 4 jiyax 21 ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Central african republic ta sayang o kiya ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 30 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra (kngkawas 1957 idas 4 diyax 21-), Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo na Seyjicya, kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 22 prading ngalan Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo Congri, kngkawas 2013 idas 1 mnhdu qpahun. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra (1957ŚĻī4śúą21śó•Ôľć),Central African Republic Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mptusa Pyasan Tubeyhing Suswey, kngkawas 2004 prading daw ngalan Pyasan Tubeyhing Bangui Kocyo, kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 22 cida pnlawa na Fulangsuowa Boziz√© pnsdhuwan phiyu burah Congri, lmutuc wada malax qpahun na Elie Dotai. Kngkawas 2013 idas 1 diyax 17, heytay hantay seyhu u wada umluk ya bay 1/3 dxral qnlhangan, seyhu mi Hantaypay u wada Mddahur Pbatas Psblayaq Pnsdhuwan, wada palaxan qpahun ka Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, Hantaypay ryus Nicolas Tianguei ka wada phyuwan Congri. Kngkawas 2016 idas 2 diyax 14, Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mniq kngkawas 2015 dhuq kngkawas 2016 Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo knbeyhing seyngkyo kcka tumn2 seyngkyo wada mangal 62.71% hyo mbiyax mangal, idas 3 diyax 30 cida psdhuwan phiyu Soto. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 12 muda Soto seyngkyo tu1 meytaq hyo cida mangal 53.92% niqan brihan hyo wada mbiyax, mndungus lmutuc mangal Soto. Kngkawas 2018 niqan ka kari qnbhangan tmiyu Russia na Wagner Citwan u snquri Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra nanaq muda qpahun quri pawan. Kndusan niya cuxan mi kyoiku Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa mntuting Bangui; cbiyaw balay pnyahan llutuc tnsapah niya Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u snpeyyah tudaya Bangui na Damara. Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u mniq Pyasan Sweyweyn Barthelemy Boganda muyas, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 1976 cida mangal Sweys Sweywey, bukuy daw mniq kngkawas 1986 cida mniq France Pyasan Tubeyhing Lille Keci (Lille I) mangal Hakasey Sweywey. Kndusan niya Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra pa msturung Brigitte Touad√©ra miMarguerite "Tina" Touad√©ra. Spuda pmklan kari singbung hokoku, ddha qridin niyi u mniq buykuy pa muda balay ppweluk hangan Tu1 Hujn Tukcka Afrika Konghkwo. Faustin-Archange Touad√©raŤąáBrigitte Touad√©raŚŹäMarguerite "Tina" Touad√©ra Kiya uri pa, Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra u niqan 3 ka laqi niya.

¶bijaw balaj pnjańßan llutu ¶ tnsapańß nija *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u snp…ôjańß tudaja baŇčui na dama…ĺa. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u mniq pjasan sw…ôw…ôn ba…ĺtńß…ôl…ômj boganda mujas, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida maŇčal sw…ôs sw…ôw…ô, bukuj daw mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mniq *…ĺan ¶…ô pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč lill…ô k…ô ¶i (lill…ô i) maŇčal ńßakas…ô sw…ôw…ô. kndusan nija *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa pa mstu…ĺuŇč b…ĺigitt…ô touad*…ĺa mima…ĺgu…ô…ĺit…ô "tina" touad*…ĺa. spuda pmklan ka…ĺi siŇčbuŇč ńßokoku, ddńßa q…ĺidin niji u mniq bujkuj pa muda balaj ppw…ôluk ńßaŇčan tu* ńßu…ün tuk ¶ka a*…ĺika koŇčńßkwo. *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa*b…ĺigitt…ô touad*…ĺa*ma…ĺgu…ô…ĺit…ô "tina" touad*…ĺa kija u…ĺi pa, *austin-a…ĺ ¶ńßaŇč…ô touad*…ĺa u niqan * ka laqi nija.
